member.name: T:JsonEditLocal
member.summary: All needed references must be present, also global usings!

member.name: T:JsonEditNuGet
member.summary: All needed references must be present, also global usings!

member.name: M:Orchid.Credentials.Credential.Initialize
member.summary: Verifying that initializing is done

member.name: M:Orchid.Credentials.Credential.IsRestrictedRegion
member.summary: Verifying if region is restricted

member.name: M:Orchid.Credentials.Credential.IsWhitelisted
member.summary: Verify if usage of the package is valid! This check is activated by ViewExtension.

member.name: M:Orchid.Credentials.Credential.WhitelistedUser
member.summary: Verifying if user is black listed

member.name: M:Orchid.Credentials.Credential.WhitelistedDomain
member.summary: Verifying if domain is white listed

member.name: M:Orchid.Credentials.Credential.IsBlacklisted
member.summary: Verify if usage of the package is valid! This check is activated by ViewExtension.

member.name: M:Orchid.Credentials.Credential.BlacklistedUser
member.summary: Verifying if user is black listed

member.name: M:Orchid.Credentials.Credential.BlacklistedDomain
member.summary: Verifying if domain is black listed

member.name: M:Orchid.Credentials.JsonServices.GetUser(System.String)
member.summary: Get current user

member.name: M:Orchid.Credentials.JsonServices.GetDomain(System.String)
member.summary: Get current domain

member.name: M:Orchid.Credentials.JsonServices.IsRestrictedVersion``1(``0)
member.summary: If return value is true, then it is a restricted version!

member.name: M:Orchid.Credentials.JsonServices.IsOverdueDate``1(``0)
member.summary: If return value is true, then it is an overdue data!

member.name: M:Orchid.Extensions.Extension.Startup(Dynamo.Extensions.StartupParams)
member.summary:
Action to be invoked when Dynamo begins to start up.
This action is *not* guaranteed to be invoked unless the extension is already installed at startup.
Exceptions thrown from this method will be caught by Dynamo and logged.

member.name: M:Orchid.Extensions.Extension.Ready(Dynamo.Extensions.ReadyParams)
member.summary:
Action to be invoked when the Dynamo has started up and is ready for user interaction.
This action is guaranteed to be called even if the extension is installed after startup.
Exceptions thrown from this method will be caught by Dynamo and logged.

member.name: M:Orchid.Extensions.Extension.Dispose
member.summary: Method that is called for freeing, releasing, or resetting unmanaged resources.

member.name: M:Orchid.Extensions.Extension.Shutdown
member.summary: Action to be invoked when shutdown has begun.

member.name: M:Orchid.Extensions.ViewExtension.Startup(Dynamo.Wpf.Extensions.ViewStartupParams)
member.summary: Method that is called when Dynamo starts, but is not yet ready to be used.
member.param: Parameters that provide references to Dynamo settings, version and extension manager.

member.name: M:Orchid.Extensions.ViewExtension.Loaded(Dynamo.Wpf.Extensions.ViewLoadedParams)
member.summary: Method that is called when Dynamo has finished loading and the UI is ready to be interacted with.
member.param: Parameters that provide references to Dynamo commands, settings, events and Dynamo UI items like menus or the background preview. This object is supplied by Dynamo itself.

member.name: M:Orchid.Extensions.ViewExtension.OnWorkspaceOpened(Dynamo.Graph.Workspaces.IWorkspaceModel)
member.summary: Method that is called when Dynamo workspace is opened

member.name: M:Orchid.Extensions.ViewExtension.OnWorkspaceChange(Dynamo.Graph.Workspaces.IWorkspaceModel)
member.summary: Method that is called when Dynamo workspace is changed

member.name: M:Orchid.Extensions.ViewExtension.Dispose
member.summary: Method that is called for freeing, releasing, or resetting unmanaged resources.

member.name: M:Orchid.Extensions.ViewExtension.Shutdown
member.summary: Method that is called when the host Dynamo application is closed.

member.name: T:Orchid.Resources.Notification
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.AssemblyNotFoundArgs
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Could not find {0} among the loaded assemblies..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.AssemblyTypeNotFoundArgs
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Could not find {0} in {1}..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.CategoryExistArgs
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The category {0} already exists in document..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.CategoryNotFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Category not found in document..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.CurveIsNotPlanar
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Curve ist not planar. Please supply a planar curve..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.DataStorageNotFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Schema DataStorage not found in document..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.DirectoryNotFoundArgs
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The directory could not be found at: {0}.

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.DocumentCloudError
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The document is a cloud driven document, therefore no local path cane be returned!.

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.DocumentEqual
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to It is not allowed that both document are the same..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.DocumentNullError
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Both input documents cant be set to null..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.ElementLocationInvalid
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The location of the element is not valid..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.ElementNotFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Element not found in document..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.ElementTypeNotFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to ElementType not found in document..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.EmptyElevationMarker
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to ElevationMarker has no views.

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.EnumInvalid
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Could not find the enumeration type and/or its value..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.EnumValueNotFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Enumeration value not found..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.FamilyNotFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Family not found in document..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.FamilyTypeNotFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to FamilyType not found in document..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.FileNameInvalidArgs
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to "{0}" cannot contain any of the following characters: \ / : * ? " < > |.

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.FileNotFoundArgs
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The file could not be found at: {0}.

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.FilterTypeInvalid
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to FilterType is not valid or not found in document..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.GeometryConversionError
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to One or more geometries have failed to convert due to this error: .

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.GeometryPolyCurveConversionError
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Revit does not support turning PolyCurves into ModelCurves. Try exploding your PolyCurve into multiple Curves..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.InvalidConversionArgs
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} have failed to convert due to this error:.

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.InvalidDirectoryArgs
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to the Directory {0} is read-only, or owned by someone else..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.InvalidFilePathArgs
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The file path "{0}" is not a valid filename, it is a directory!.

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.InvalidForgeTypeIdArgs
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The id string is not valid for object of type {0}..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.InvalidGroupTypeArgs
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} is not a valid GroupType..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.InvalidInput
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Input is not valid or missing..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.InvalidKeys
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to One or more input types are not matching. Lists as keys are not supported..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.InvalidKeysLenght
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Number of items does not match the number of keys. href=InvalidKeysLenght.html.

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.InvalidListLength
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Number of items are not the same in all lists..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.InvalidObject
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Object is not valid or not found in document..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.InvalidObjectArgs
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} named {1}, is not valid or not found in document..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.InvalidStringToNumber
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Not a valid number..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.InvalidType
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Type is not valid or not found in document..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.InvalidTypeArgs
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} is not valid or not found in document..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.LinkNotFoundArgs
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to "{0}" cannot be found, please reload..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.ListInvalid
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to List is null, empty or not valid..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.ListNotMatching
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Index or list containing index is not matching input..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.ListToFewItems
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to List must contain at least two items..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.MaterialSchemaInvalid
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Material schema is not valid or not found in document..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.NameExistArgs
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The name {0} already exists in document..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.NoActiveDocumentFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to No active Revit document found..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.None
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to None.

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.NotLightFamily
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Please run this command in a lighting fixtures document..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.NotPlanView
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The provided input view is not a plan view..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.NotRevitFamily
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Please run this command in a family document..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.NotRevitProject
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Please run this command in a project document..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to ParameterGroup is not valid or not found in document..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.ParameterNotFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Parameter not found in document..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.ParameterStorageTypeArgs
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Parameter {0} has no storage type or value is null..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.ParameterTypeNotFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to ParameterType is not valid or not found in document..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.PrintMarginMismatch
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Margin need two double values as input..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.PrintSettingExist
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Print setting exist by this name, please provide a new name..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.SharedParameterFileNotFoundArgs
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to No shared parameter file found..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.SharedParameterGroupNotFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to SharedParameter group not found in document..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.SharedParameterNotAllowed
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to SharedParameter is not allowed!.

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.SharedParameterNotFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to SharedParameter not found in document..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Spatial boundary not found..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.SpatialTypeNotFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Spatial type not found in document..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to SystemTree node not found or tree is empty..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.TypeNotFoundArgs
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} type not found in document..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.View3DCropboxError
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to It doesn't make sense to rotate 3D View and Walkthrough view cropbox, move cropbox instead..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.ViewDoesNotSupportAnnotations
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to View does not support annotations..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.ViewNotFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to View not found in document..

member.name: P:Orchid.Resources.Notification.ViewSheetSetNotFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to ViewSheetSet not found in document..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to View has a view template applied!.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to View type cannot be moved..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Workset not found in document..
